tasks.dev: deno run --allow-env=HOME --allow-read="$HOME/.apw,$HOME/Library/Application Support,/Applications,/Library/Google/Chrome/NativeMessagingHosts" --allow-write="$HOME/.apw" --allow-net="127.0.0.1,unix:$HOME/.apw/apw.sock" --allow-run="/Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/Chromium,/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome,/Applications/Brave Browser.app/Contents/MacOS/Brave Browser,/Applications/Microsoft Edge.app/Contents/MacOS/Microsoft Edge" src/cli.ts
tasks.compile: deno compile --allow-env=HOME --allow-read="$HOME/.apw,$HOME/Library/Application Support,/Applications,/Library/Google/Chrome/NativeMessagingHosts" --allow-write="$HOME/.apw" --allow-net="127.0.0.1,unix:$HOME/.apw/apw.sock" --allow-run="/Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/Chromium,/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome,/Applications/Brave Browser.app/Contents/MacOS/Brave Browser,/Applications/Microsoft Edge.app/Contents/MacOS/Microsoft Edge" -o apw src/cli.ts
tasks.compile:x86_64: deno compile --allow-env=HOME --allow-read="$HOME/.apw,$HOME/Library/Application Support,/Applications,/Library/Google/Chrome/NativeMessagingHosts" --allow-write="$HOME/.apw" --allow-net="127.0.0.1,unix:$HOME/.apw/apw.sock" --allow-run="/Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/Chromium,/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome,/Applications/Brave Browser.app/Contents/MacOS/Brave Browser,/Applications/Microsoft Edge.app/Contents/MacOS/Microsoft Edge" --target x86_64-apple-darwin -o dist/apw-x86_64-apple-darwin src/cli.ts
